_comment: Copy this file to a new name (e.g. TRD_10004.json), fill every empty string, then import. Do not import this template as-is.

product._product_id_comment: Pattern: OPT_PVE_{UNDERLYING}_{C|P}_{STRIKE}_{YYYYMMDD} — keep in sync with underlying_id, option_type, strike, expiry_date

trade._booking_timestamp_comment: optional — YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS (SQLite TEXT); null = not set at import

legs._execution_price_comment: leave null — filled by booking pricer on trade_date (import stores 0 until then)
legs._commission_comment: optional — total USD on leg; null = 0. Or set commission_per_contract below
legs._commission_per_contract_comment: optional — e.g. 0.75 → total commission = rate × quantity at import
